channel.title: drafts, paper on Arn
channel.description: Recent content in drafts, paper on Arn

item.title: Motor outcome prediction
item.description: 2020 - S.Saha et al. Motor outcome measurement with existing assessment. ~30 weeks PMA subjects. Uses 3D patches of MRI as input, 26x26x26 after gridsearch selection. Only take patches containing >50% brain matter. Used registration for skullstriping. Data augmentation: left-right flip, because any anatomical variation in the right hemisphere benefits the left and respectively. Model architecture, classification CNN: 3x [[2DCNN]] into 3 [[FC]]. A complete image was classified as abnormal if at least 27% of its patches predicted abnormal outcome.
